news_items.headline: Pair of 1st-time winners take home Player of the Week honors
Mets calling up LHP Zach Thornton to pitch on Wednesday
news_items.summary: In need of a starter following Clay Holmes’ fibula fracture, the Mets are calling up left-hander Zach Thornton from Triple-A Syracuse.

news_items.headline: Mets call up Daniel Duarte, option Joey Gerber to Syracuse
news_items.summary: Duarte had a 2.60 ERA in 17.1 innings with Syracuse.

news_items.headline: Where to watch Los Angeles Dodgers vs. San Diego Padres: Live stream, TV channel, odds for Monday, May 18
news_items.summary: The Dodgers open a three-game series against the NL West rival Padres.

news_items.headline: Rival fan who didn't interfere with HR robbery rewarded with signed ball
Cubs, Crew renew rivalry in Central showdown
Rangers' Brandon Nimmo gives Astros fans signed baseballs with message for not interfering with home run-robbing catch
news_items.summary: Nimmo showed appreciation to Houston fans who didn't interfere with him taking a home run away from Astros slugger Yordan Alvarez.

news_items.headline: Where to watch Milwaukee Brewers vs. Chicago Cubs: Live stream, TV channel, odds for Monday, May 18
news_items.summary: The Brewers and Cubs start a three-game series.

news_items.headline: Dodgers, Padres start NL West showdown
news_items.summary: The Dodgers and Padres are meeting for the first time this season, and only a half game separates the division lead

news_items.headline: Where to watch Toronto Blue Jays vs. New York Yankees: Live stream, TV channel, odds for Monday, May 18
news_items.summary: The Yankees play host to the Blue Jays.

news_items.headline: 2026 Fantasy Baseball Top 300: Shohei Ohtani, Vladimir Guerrero Jr. drop in top 10 shakeup
news_items.summary: Bobby Witt Jr. climbs one spot in the first movement inside the top three, and Colt Emerson debuts in this week's update.

news_items.headline: 14-4 with Mattingly, surging Phils back over .500
news_items.summary: The resurgent Phillies improved to 15-4 since interim manager Don Mattingly took over, and they also shot over the .500 mark, at 24-23, for the first time since April 7 as Philadelphia beat the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0, completing a three-game sweep Sunday.

news_items.headline: Mariners call up top prospect Emerson for debut
news_items.summary: Mariners infielder Colt Emerson, the No. 6-ranked overall prospect, made his major league debut in Sunday's loss to the Padres.

news_items.headline: Mets swipe Subway Series after 'awesome' rally
news_items.summary: Still in last place in the National League East, the Mets might have turned a corner this weekend, authoring two wins to close out the Subway Series with the Yankees, the last of which was fueled by Tyrone Taylor's ninth-inning, three-run home run Sunday.

news_items.headline: White Sox's Quero 'visualized' walk-off HR vs. Cub...
news_items.summary: The White Sox took two of three from their crosstown rival thanks to Edgar Quero's walk-off home run in the 10th inning Sunday. "I visualized it last night," Quero said.

news_items.headline: Ailing Astros lose Altuve to IL with oblique strai...
news_items.summary: Astros second baseman Jose Altuve has a left oblique strain and will be placed on the injured list, manager Joe Espada said.

news_items.headline: Rangers' Seager remains sidelined, having MRI
news_items.summary: Rangers All-Star shortstop Corey Seager was out of the lineup for a second straight game Sunday against the Astros because of back spasms.

news_items.headline: Updated MLB draft rankings: Top 150 prospects
news_items.summary: Here's who is soaring up MLB draft boards as college baseball tournament week begins.
